name: Du-Jun Kang
description: The son of a rich family and the CEO of a company. He is always cool and calm and has a plan, but when it comes to Hui-Won's business, he goes out of his way without hesitation.

name: Green Okido
description: Green has a serious, calm, and focused personality in everything he does. Although Red and Green were once bothered by each other because their personalities are so opposite, they ended up resolving their differences. Green and his Strike were trained by Shijima of Tanba City when he was a child. name: Hikaru Minato
description: The most powerful Musha known as Ginseigo and Kageaki's sister.

name: Hikaru Shindou
description: Hikaru is a sixth grader in elementary school. An important factor in the development of Hikaru's passion for Go was an encounter early on where Hikaru becomes the rival of Akira Toya. At first, he thinks that Go is just for oldsters and he is annoyed at Sai's demand to play, but little by little his passion for Go increases as he plays more and more. name: Himari Ishikura
description: A classmate of Akane and Saito. She is gyaru, but despite her flamboyant appearance she has a warm personality. She cares about Akane and Saito, who fight all the time.

name: Ibuki
description: __Occupation:__ Member of the Shishigumi Ibuki is a Maasai lion in his mid-thirties with an athletic build. He has light golden-yellow fur, light brown mane, and sharp, slanted eyes with small black pupils. Ibuki has tattoos on the left side of his body from his time as a child going to be used for making hyperdrugs.

name: Ichika Hoshino
description: __Height:__ 161 cm (5'3'') - 162 cm (5'4") Hoshino Ichika is a student at Miyamasuzaka Girls Academy. She's the guitarist and vocalist of Leo/need. Despite her cool and stoic looks, Ichika is a kind girl who cares about her friends. She formed the band "Leo/need" together with her childhood friends Saki, Honami, and Shiho, and has achieved their dream of becoming professionals. Ichika is the guitarist and vocalist in Leo/need. She also writes the lyrics for Leo/need's original songs, and recentl
mediaTitles: COLORFUL STAGE! The Movie: A Miku Who Can't Sing

name: Kenji Kazama
description: An 'infamous' delinquent at Fujou High. Unlike the members of his gang, he possesses no special or remarkable traits other than his hard spiky hair and his straight man ability. He is also a member of the Game Production Club (Temp), after he was coerced into it by the other 4 original members. He has a desire to be the strongest at the school, but constantly wonders why the girls are much more stronger; and why the guys are usually freaks.

name: Keroro
description: Keroro is the main protagonist of the series. Keroro is the sergeant and leader of the Keroro Platoon. His self-introduction at this time is The Gamma Planetary System, the 58th Planet, Space Invasion Army Special Tactics Platoon Leader, Sergeant Keroro. Keroro lurked in the Hinata household until he was discovered by Natsumi and Fuyuki, after which he was captured. With the Kero Ball, his weapon, taken from him and his army having abandoned him, Keroro easily surrendered. The freeloader (former

name: Kukuru Anrakutei
description: A girl with straight black hair who is very good at acting, but is an unlucky girl and is very emotionally unstable. Her name is perhaps a pun on anrakushi ("Euthanasia") and kukuru ("to hang").

name: Kyoutarou Sugishita
description: **Height:** 192 cm A first-year student at Furin High School in Class 1. Sugishita's a mad dog and quite talented — he's the only one who's been allowed to call himself "Bofurin" since middle school. His motivation and driving force come from his excessive loyalty and devotion to Umemiya - whatever Umemiya says, goes. He's usually quiet and has a unique sway as he walks. When he gets mad, though, he's the most unpredictable of them all. (Source: WIND BREAKER Official Website)

name: Lihaku
description: Lihaku is a military officer, residing in the outer court of the palace. He's strong and honest, but not exactly brilliant.

name: Marida Cruz
description: A female pilot of the MS "Kshatriya" on board the Garancieres. A capable pilot and artificial Newtype. She refers to captain Zaberoa as "Master" and loyally carry out his orders. ~!Originally known as "Ple Twelve", she is actually a clone of Elpeo Ple. She was awakened by Glemy Toto and fought with her sisters during the First Neo-Zeon War. After the fight with Chara Soon in U.C.0089.1.17, one of the clones survived and was retrieved by an MS pod. She was then sold to prostitution, there on she

name: Mashiro Tsukiyuki
description: A member of the gymnastics team at Hakumei University Affiliated High School.

name: Matama Akoya
description: __Height:__ 155 cm __Favorite Food:__ Sweet Rolled Omelettes __Least Favorite Food:__ Coriander __Recent Ambition:__ To Have A Video Of Her Singing Go Viral On Social Media Matama is a cheerful girl. However, she is also quite narcissistic and very sensitive to criticism. name: Miku Okazaki
description: Miku decides to join the cooking club since her home economics teacher pushed her to try harder instead of shoving her into makeup-lessons like her other teachers.

name: Pursena Adoldia
nativeName: プルセナ・アドルディア
description: Together with Linia Dedoldia they are the two troublemakers in Ranoa Magic Academy, but when it comes to fulfilling her dreams of becoming the Village Chief she will do her best. She likes eating meat. (Source: Mushoku Tensei wiki)

name: Reika Aoki
description: When first introduced, Reika is elegant and quiet, but also quite understanding. She is modest and hates to put anyone through trouble, going so far as to initially refuse any help. Reika is also shown to be quite calm and patient, not even appearing phased as the others told her about Pretty Cure, and she tried to politely spare their feelings when refusing their request. She is very responsible and hard working on her studies, clubs, and as a Pretty Cure. She manages to keep her fear in contro

name: Ruki Mukami
description: **Race:** Vampire **Height:** 180 cm

name: Tahoumaru Daigo
description: Brother of Hyakkimaru and the second son (successor) of Kagemitsu Daigo. Born after Hyakkimaru was abandoned.

name: Umika Konohoshi
description: She is a first-year student of Fujino Misaki High School who was unable to make friends due to extreme fright, and she was escaping from reality, thinking that she could express her feelings to aliens living on planets other than Earth. She is extremely frightened and unable to communicate well with others. After meeting [Yu](https://anilist.co/character/300088/Yuu-Akeuchi), they set a goal to build a rocket to reach the stars in space. Her special skill is swimming.

name: Violet
description: Violet is a dancing woman and an assassin of the Donquixote Pirates. ~!She is the younger sister of the late Scarlett, and Rebecca's maternal aunt. She is also King Riku Dold III's second daughter, making her the crown princess of Dressrosa and current heiress to the throne, after Rebecca forfeited her title!~
mediaTitles: One Piece - Episode of Sabo: Bond of Three Brothers - A Miraculous Reunion and an Inherited Will

name: Xiaohei Luo
description: Xiaohei is a cat spirit who lived in a forest for years before humans cut it down. He was angry with humans at first, but eventually grew to like them.

name: Yozuru Kagenui
description: Yozuru was first introduced in Tsukihi Phoenix. She is an onmyouji and one of [Meme](https://anilist.co/character/22552/Meme-Oshino)'s clubmates at the university. As a rule she imposed on herself, she's not allowed to step on the ground. Between the three kouhai during university she was the only one who graduated. She fights by using her fists and is powerful enough to punch through multiple floors at once.
